_fixtureNote: PARTIAL — from AS4 AD10 Type Tower (0-10 deg) weight diagram in Tower Types - Merged.pdf. commonPortion and legExtensionOptions below are verified exact (commonPortion sums to the stated 46333kg; leg extension deltas checked against the printed x4 totals). heightVariants below only include what reconciled with high confidence (M6 base + M3's own addition). The mapping of the remaining printed variant TOTALS (STD/E3/E6/E9/E12) to their individual additionalComponents did NOT reconcile cleanly on the pass I ran — the source table's row/column order got scrambled somewhere in extraction and I was not able to re-derive it with confidence, unlike the AS4 AD/BD families where every variant matched exactly. Rather than guess, I've left printedTotalWeightKg populated (these ARE the totals stated on the drawing) but additionalComponents empty for STD/E3/E6/E9/E12 — cross-check these against the original drawing before relying on itemized component weights for this family. Common portion + leg extension + total-weight-only use is safe; per-item breakdown for this family is not yet trustworthy.

heightVariants.label: M6 TOWER (MIN. HT. TOWER)
heightVariants.notes: This family's true minimum-height variant per the drawing's own elevation labelling. Which printed total column belongs to M6 vs which belongs to M3 was NOT unambiguous in extraction — see family-level _fixtureNote. Do not assume ordering.

additionalComponents.name: M3 Body Extension
additionalComponents.notes: Verified exact: commonPortion + (±0m leg ext x4) + 1286kg = 53459kg.
